action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc=0.577 from iter9 (simple augs+weighted CE no sampler, 5eps); iter10 overwrote ckpt with 0.535 (Focal+RandAugment). Curves show stable val but DG gap on rares (bird/squirrel~0.2). Time critically low (~3min left). Analysis: Over-aggressive augs/loss in last iter hurt; must recover iter9 config to regain ~0.577+. Dataset.py+predict.py solid (TTA helps). Decision: Edit train.py to iter9-like (mild RandomResizedCrop/Flip/Jitter, no RandAugment/Focal/sampler, weighted CE, drop=0.1, lr=2e-5+cosine+wd=0.05, epochs=2 to fit time), run short train then submit_eval on new best.pt. Hope to match/exceed 0.577 before time expires.
